mapper.sql: A.OCCRRNC_YEAR AS occrrncYear, A.USER_ID AS mberId, A.YRYC_OCCRRNC_CO AS occrncYrycCo, A.USE_YRYC_CO AS useYrycCo, A.REMNDR_YRYC_CO AS remndrYrycCo, (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.USER_ID) AS mberNm, A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId, TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm

sql.if: AND (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.USER_ID) LIKE CONCAT(CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}),'%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.OCCRRNC_YEAR DESC, A.USER_ID LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE A WHERE 1=1
SELECT FROM TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE A WHERE A.USER_ID = #{mberId} AND A.OCCRRNC_YEAR = #{occrrncYear}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE (OCCRRNC_YEAR, USER_ID, YRYC_OCCRRNC_CO, USE_YRYC_CO, REMNDR_YRYC_CO, FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, FRST_REGISTER_ID) VALUES (#{occrrncYear}, #{mberId}, #{occrncYrycCo}, #{useYrycCo}, #{remndrYrycCo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{frstRegisterId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_INDVDL_YRYC_MANAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{mberId} AND OCCRRNC_YEAR = #{occrrncYear}
